title: Rename libpod.Config back to ContainerConfig
body: During an earlier bugfix, we swapped all instances of ContainerConfig to Config, which was meant to fix some data we were returning from Inspect. This unfortunately also renamed a libpod internal struct for container configs. Undo the rename here.

comments.body: EasyJSON appears to be exploding. Let me fix that.

@mheon Lint is complaing,

Does podman inspect still show Config and not ContainerConfig?
@rhatdan Yeah - this is just find-replace being too aggressive and finding over things named ContainerConfig

@vrothberg @giuseppe @umohnani8 @TomSweeneyRedHat @baude PTAL

We need to get this into v1.0
